name: analyze-state
description: Workflow to review and improve state management patterns in Flutter apps, ensuring consistency and identifying anti-patterns

workflowSteps.name: Scope Definition
workflowSteps.description: Define what to analyze (entire app, specific feature, single screen, or pattern)

workflowSteps.name: Pattern Recognition
workflowSteps.description: Identify state management solution and consistency

workflowSteps.name: Data Flow Mapping
workflowSteps.description: Create visual representation: UserAction → Event/Method → State Change → UI Update

workflowSteps.name: Issue Identification
workflowSteps.description: Find state at wrong scope, circular dependencies, missing error handling, inconsistent patterns, testing difficulties

workflowSteps.name: Improvement Recommendations
workflowSteps.description: Suggest refactoring opportunities, consistency improvements, better error handling, testing strategies

workflowSteps.name: Implementation Guide
workflowSteps.description: Provide step-by-step refactoring plan, code examples, migration strategy, testing approach
